# 🌅 Morning Digest — Friday, May 22, 2026

## 📬 Emails Needing Attention

⚠️ **Microsoft 365 connector requires re-authentication.** Email data could not be retrieved for this run. Please reconnect the MS365 plugin in Cowork settings so future digests can pull your inbox.

## 💬 Teams — Active Conversations

⚠️ **Microsoft Teams data unavailable** — MS365 connector needs re-auth.

## 📅 Today's Agenda

⚠️ **Calendar data unavailable** — MS365 connector needs re-auth. Please check your calendar directly for today's meetings.

## ⚡ Immediate Action

**Action required:** The Microsoft 365 connector used to pull your emails, Teams messages, and calendar is not authenticated. Re-connect it in Cowork → Plugins → MS365 to restore your morning digest. No data could be retrieved for today's run.
